---
title: "test_pennyone_phase4_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pennyone_phase4_empire.ts"
loc: 78
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.25
style_score: 4.01
intel_score: 4.56
overall_score: 4.74
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [SubspaceRelay](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/live/socket.js)
- [startWatcher](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/live/watcher.js)
- [startBridge](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/vis/server.js)
- [createServer](file://http)
- [WebSocket](file://ws)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `httpServer`
- `relay`
- `port`
- `client`
- `messageReceived`
- `received`
- `testDir`
- `testFile`
- `httpServer`
- `relay`
- `broadcastPayload`
- `watcher`
- `testDir`
- `httpServer`
- `relay`
- `rebuiltSignaled`
- `watcher`
